case_title: HOGAN, TOM VS SPORTS PLACEMENT (WERNER, HARLAN -OWNER)

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-25-2001, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JUN-22-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DEFENDANT HARLAN J. WERNER REQUEST FOR A THREE -WEEK POSTPONEMENT OF HEARING DATE SUBMITTED TO THE COMMISSIONER FOR APPROVAL.
